# DigiHistCH24 — Digital History Switzerland 2024

> DigiHistCH24 is a conference on "Historical Research, Digital Literacy, and Algorithmic Criticism," hosted by the University of Basel on September 12–13, 2024. It brings together scholars, researchers, and professionals to address the evolving role of digital technologies in historical research. All abstracts and the conference program are available on this site.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://digihistch24.github.io/)
- [Book of Abstracts](https://digihistch24.github.io/book-of-abstracts.html)
- [Conference Program](https://digihistch24.github.io/conference-program.html)
- [Call for Contributions](https://digihistch24.github.io/call-for-contributions.html)
- [About](https://digihistch24.github.io/about.html)

## Keynote

- [When Literacy Goes Digital: Rethinking the Ethics and Politics of Digitisation](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/keynote/)

## Paper Submissions

- [Data-Driven Approaches to Studying the History of Museums on the Web](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/405/)
- [On a solid ground. Building software for a 120-year-old research project](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/427/)
- [Tables are tricky. Testing TEI Guidelines for FAIR upcycling of digitised historical statistics](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/428/)
- [Training engineering students through a digital humanities project: Techn'hom Time Machine](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/429/)
- [From manual work to artificial intelligence: developments in data literacy (Repertorium Academicum Germanicum)](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/431/)
- [A handful of pixels of blood: Decoding early video game graphics with the FAVR ontology](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/438/)
- [Impresso 2: Connecting Historical Digitised Newspapers and Radio](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/443/)
- [Learning to Read Digital? Constellations of Correspondence Project and 19th-century Finnish Letter Metadata](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/444/)
- [Teaching the use of Automated Text Recognition online. Ad fontes goes ATR](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/445/)
- [Geovistory, a LOD Research Infrastructure for Historical Sciences](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/447/)
- [Using GIS to Analyze the Development of Public Urban Green Spaces in Hamburg and Marseille](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/450/)
- [Belpop, a history-computer project to study the population of a town during early industrialization](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/452/)
- [Contributing to a Paradigm Shift in Historical Research by Teaching Digital Methods](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/453/)
- [Revealing the Structure of Land Ownership through Automatic Vectorisation of Swiss Cadastral Plans](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/454/)
- [Rockefeller fellows as heralds of globalization: circulation of elites, knowledge, and practices of modernization](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/455/)
- [Theory and Practice of Historical Data Versioning: Venice and Lausanne Census and Cadastral Datasets](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/456/)
- [Towards Computational Historiographical Modeling](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/457/)
- [Efficacy of Chat GPT Correlations vs. Co-occurrence Networks in Deciphering Chinese History](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/458/)
- [Data Literacy and the Role of Libraries](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/459/)
- [20 godparents and 3 wives – studying migrant glassworkers in post-medieval Estonia](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/460/)
- [From record cards to dynamics of real estate transactions: Basel's historical land register, 1400-1700](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/462/)
- [When the Data Becomes Meta: Quality Control for Digitized Ancient Heritage Collections](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/464/)
- [On the Historiographic Authority of Machine Learning Systems](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/465/)
- [Films as sources and as means of communication for knowledge gained from historical research](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/468/)
- [Develop Yourself! Development according to the Rockefeller Foundation (1913–2013)](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/469/)
- [AI-assisted Search for Digitized Publication Archives using NLP and data visualization](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/471/)
- [Digital Film Collection Literacy – Critical Research Interfaces for the Encyclopaedia Cinematographica](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/473/)
- [From Source-Criticism to System-Criticism: Born Digital Objects, Forensic Methods, and Digital Literacy](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/474/)
- [Connecting floras and herbaria before 1850 – challenges and lessons learned in digital history of biodiversity](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/480/)
- [A Digital History of Internationalization: Operationalizing Concepts and Exploring Patent Documents](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/482/)
- [From words to numbers. Methodological perspectives on large scale Named Entity Linking](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/486/)
- [Go Digital, They Said. It Will Be Fun, They Said. Teaching DH Methods for Historical Research](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/687/)
- [Unveiling Historical Depth: Semantic annotation of the Panorama of the Battle of Murten](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/873/)

- [transcriptiones – Create, Share and Access Transcriptions of Historical Manuscripts](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/poster/463/)
- [Economies of Space: Opening up Historical Finding Aids](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/poster/466/)
- [Discuss Data -- an Open Repository for Research and Data Communities](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/poster/472/)
- [Modeling in history: using LLMs to produce diagrammatic models synthesizing Piketty's thesis on economic inequalities](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/poster/476/)
- [Swiss Google Books for Research](https://digihistch24.github.io/submissions/poster/484/)
